docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY STRATTON KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT BEERE EILEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-08-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF JUN-10-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEERE EILEEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STRATTON KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEERE EILEEN $1,506.50 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,514.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BEERE EILEEN
